title: Article about Evangelion or Gainax in episode 21
display_title: Article about Evangelion or Gainax in episode 21
wikitext:
[]: Article about Evangelion or Gainax in episode 21?             Quote Post by Kraider » Mon Jan 20, 2014 10:23 pm I was watching episode 21 and noticed that, when the "giant of light" is mentioned, there is english text in the paper on the clipboard. The photo is blocking some if it and the slant if it makes some of it go out of the frame, but it's talking about anime production, some previous projects in live action films including ultraman, and an animated film festival of some kind. Has anyone else noticed this? I have done a google search with the episode number and the word "article", even "newspaper" and "news article" in the search, and have searched wikis for any mention of it, but I found nothing. It seems to be about the Second Impact at first, but the smaller text appear to be cut from something else. What do you guys think? It's at 8:46 in the episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 21, 2014 2:19 am Same as the history of Gainax that Misato finds when doing her hacker bit in EoE; there was some discussion way back, but it'll take some digging to find it.

[]:             Quote Post by Kraider » Tue Jan 21, 2014 2:22 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Same as the history of Gainax that Misato finds when doing her hacker bit in EoE; there was some discussion way back, but it'll take some digging to find it.
